success_criteria: Stage 2/3 after order backlog and OP/EPS revisions should align with 6-24 month rerating.
failure_criteria: Theme rally without OP/EPS or margin follow-through becomes false_positive_score.
normalization_point: Transformer shortage is a high-Green-potential axis only when contract quality, backlog, lead time, and revisions are source-backed.

success_criteria: Recurring vaccine or biosecurity revenue after the event can support Watch-to-Green.
failure_criteria: Disease headline rally that normalizes with no recurring revenue is one_off_event.
normalization_point: Animal health must separate recurring vaccines from one-off disease-event themes.

success_criteria: Revenue growth plus improving FCF and stable CAC can align.
failure_criteria: DTC growth with CAC, impairment, or privacy drawdown becomes false_positive_score.
normalization_point: Telehealth needs B2B/B2B2C repeat revenue and privacy discipline, not DTC ad spend growth alone.

success_criteria: Gold price, cost discipline, FCF, and capital return moving together can align as cyclical_success.
failure_criteria: Gold price headline without cost/production/FCF support becomes false_positive_score.
normalization_point: Precious-metals miners are cycle-sensitive; Green is limited unless realized price and FCF are both visible.

success_criteria: Recurring maintenance, payment, or software economics can support Watch-to-Green.
failure_criteria: One-off hardware or retailer rollback after theft/customer friction is one_off_hardware.
normalization_point: Kiosk/self-checkout must prove recurring economics and loss-prevention value.

success_criteria: Contract, OP/EPS revision, and rerating moving together are aligned.
failure_criteria: AI optical theme rally without order/EPS support is price_moved_without_evidence.
normalization_point: Optical networking is Green-possible only when AI data-center contract and delivery economics are explicit.

success_criteria: PoC converting into recurring contracts and revenue can support Watch-to-Green.
failure_criteria: Research or policy headline without revenue is theme_watch or false_positive.
normalization_point: AI grid flexibility software is important but early; commercialization proof is the core gate.

success_criteria: B2B contracts, low CAC, privacy compliance, legal channels, and FCF can align.
failure_criteria: DTC growth followed by privacy/CAC/impairment is 4C-style failure.
normalization_point: Online pharma channels remain RedTeam-first when privacy, advertising, quality, or regulatory risk is unresolved.
